title: [openclaw] Podcast: OpenClaw is the first real “keyboard test” for agentic AI and most teams aren’t ready.
[openclaw] The OpenClaw-ification of AI - The AI Daily Brief
Iran’s leadership, retaliation, travel and oil disruption and Trump’s plan
description:
Israel has launched a new wave of strikes on Tehran after killing Iran's supreme leader and leaving the Islamic Republic grappling to rebuild its leadership. The U.S. and Israeli strikes, and Iranian retaliation, have sent shockwaves through sectors from shipping to air travel to oil. Inside Iran, some grieved for Khamenei while others have celebrated his death. Protests against the military action have also erupted across Pakistan and Iraq.

Follow the ⁠latest developments in Iran live⁠ by subs

title: Breaking news podcast: Inside the high-stakes U.S.-Israel attack on Iran | Haaretz defense analyst Amos Harel
description: In this special edition of the Haaretz Podcast, recorded during the first hours of the dramatic joint U.S.-Israeli attack on Iran, and as Tehran began its retaliatory strikes on Israel and on U.S. targets across the Middle East, Haaretz senior analyst Amos Harel joins host Allison Kaplan Sommer for a real-time update and discussion.
